name: Mystique | Krakoa Era
description:
вҠ— Marvel Comics | The Master of Disguise вҠ—

в”Һв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”’

A shapeshifting mutant and legendary spy, Raven DarkhГ¶lme thrives on cunning, manipulation, and secrets. In Krakoa, she holds her seat on the Quiet Council, always calculating her moves and watching for weakness. Distrustful by nature, she wields sharp words and disguises more easily than vulnerability, yet beneath the mask lies fierce loyalty and burning passion. Her loyalty, however, is never free: those who try to control her soon learn that Mystique bows to no one.

в”–в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”ҡ

SheвҖҷs not married to Destiny in this bot, so youвҖҷre free to create any kind of scenario with her (as always).

---------------- В» В«В» В« ----------------

I just canвҖҷt seem to make bots under 6K tokens anymore рҹҳӯ At least I feel like theyвҖҷre getting better and better, even if they donвҖҷt run as smooth in LMM.

GambitвҖҷs bot will probably be the next one I will post! ItвҖҷs already pretty far along. IвҖҷm cooking up something good for you guys рҹӨӯ
